name: line-chart
description: Unified line chart component supporting all variations: default, interactive, multiple, linear, step, dots, dots-colors, and custom-label configurations

xAxisData.name: xAxisData
xAxisData.description: X-axis labels. Can be a string array or object array with label and value. Example: ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar'] or [{label: 'Jan', value: 0}, {label: 'Feb', value: 1}]

data.name: data
data.description: Chart data. Can be: single series (number[]), multiple series (Array<{data: number[]}>), or named series (Array<{name: string, data: number[]}>). Example: [100, 200, 150] or [{data: [100, 200]}, {data: [150, 250]}] or [{name: 'Series A', data: [100, 200]}]

yAxisData.name: yAxisData
yAxisData.description: Y-axis labels. Can be a string array or object array with label and value. When provided, enables custom Y-axis labels. Example: ['0', '50', '100'] or [{label: 'Low', value: 0}, {label: 'High', value: 100}]

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart series. Overrides theme colors. Example: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b']

smooth.name: smooth
smooth.description: Whether to use smooth curve interpolation. Default: true

step.name: step
step.description: Step interpolation mode. When set, creates step lines instead of smooth curves. Options: 'start', 'middle', 'end', or false. Takes precedence over smooth.

boundaryGap.name: boundaryGap
boundaryGap.description: Whether to leave gaps at the start and end of the axis. Default: false

symbol.name: symbol
symbol.description: Symbol type for data points. Options: 'none', 'circle', 'rect', 'roundRect', 'triangle', 'diamond', 'pin', 'arrow'. Default: 'none'

lineWidth.name: lineWidth
lineWidth.description: Width of the line in pixels. Default: 1

lineColor.name: lineColor
lineColor.description: Color for the line (for single series or when all series should share the same color). Example: '#3b82f6'

showXAxisLabels.name: showXAxisLabels
showXAxisLabels.description: Whether to show X-axis labels. Default: true

showYAxisLabels.name: showYAxisLabels
showYAxisLabels.description: Whether to show Y-axis labels. Default: false

grid.name: grid
grid.description: Grid positioning configuration. Example: {left: '10%', right: '5%', bottom: '10%', top: '10%'}

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to display a legend for named series. Default: false

showLabels.name: showLabels
showLabels.description: Whether to show labels on data points. Default: false

labelPosition.name: labelPosition
labelPosition.description: Position of the labels on data points. Options: 'top', 'bottom', 'left', 'right', 'inside', 'insideTop', 'insideBottom'. Default: 'top'

labelFormatter.name: labelFormatter
labelFormatter.description: Custom label formatter function. Example: (params) => params.value + '%'
